Properties.Description: Evaluator encrypted with a customer-managed KMS key

LlmAsAJudge.Instructions: Evaluate whether the agent response is helpful, accurate, and well-structured. Context: {context}. Available tools: {available_tools}.

Categorical.Definition: The response fully addresses the user query with accurate information.
Categorical.Label: Good

Categorical.Definition: The response fails to address the query or contains inaccurate information.
Categorical.Label: Bad

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
